text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's unfortunate that I failed to win first place, but
I must accept the outcome as it is.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There will inevitably be times where even perfect
preparation will not guarantee victory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But so long as I continue training according to
this schedule, victory should still be within reach.
choice_data_list: You did your best, and that's what counts!
You did your best, and that's what counts!
Let's aim even higher next time!
Let's aim even higher next time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But so long as I continue training according to
this schedule, victory should still be within reach.
choice_data_list: You did your best, and that's what counts!
You did your best, and that's what counts!
Let's aim even higher next time!
Let's aim even higher next time!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I suppose. I certainly committed myself
wholeheartedly to this endeavor.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So despite being unable to win first place, it is
possible to say that I won the battle with myself.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for your support. I vow to emerge
victorious next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Of course! I have no intention of giving up now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
While these results are within the realm of
expectation, I am not satisfied with them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'll need a well thought-out plan if I hope to
achieve my goals.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's begin preparing for the next race once we
get home.
